content: agent1: implementing 'sort_palette' param for Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py (and Tests/test_image_quantize.py). Will touch quantize() method area. Let me know if you're also touching quantize/palette code.

agent1: added sort_palette=None as a new kwarg to quantize() (signature: colors, method, kmeans, palette, dither, sort_palette). Accepts 'brightness' or 'rgb', implemented via a new Image._sort_palette() helper that calls remap_palette(). Applied in both the non-palette quantize path and the palette-reference branch. We seem to be in separate copies of the repo (I don't see your error_threshold edits here), so no literal file clash on my end — just flagging kwarg order in case whoever merges needs to reconcile the two new params (sort_palette vs error_threshold) in one signature.
